title: Formula 1 Bosses
description: Adds Formula 1 Drivers as mini-bosses in Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds F1 drivers as mini-bosses in Minecraft. I made this mod as a birthday gift to a friend of mine who is a big F1 fan.

So far I have Max Verstappen and Charles Leclerc

Max's abilities
- Passive: fairly fast movement speed
- Chance to gain speed boost when damaged
- Chance to summon a "Red Bull" minion.
- Chance to gain strength boost when damaged.
- Drops two red bull cans and a music disc on defeat

Red Bull
- Drinking this clears all effects. Then applies a speed and jump boost. With a chance of regen.

Charles' abilities
- Passive: fairly fast movement speed
- Chance to gain speed boost when damaged and yell "Noooo"
- Or chance to gain regen when damaged and yell "I am stupid"
- Drops a full set of Ferrari armor. This applies Fire Resistance and Speed when the full set is equipped.
